background: Calculate the mean and standard deviation of each group depicted in each of the side-by-side stemplots in this problem. Discuss how these statistics relate to what you see.

task.query: (a) Comparison A: Calculate the mean and standard deviation for Group 1 and Group 2 based on the stemplot. Discuss how these statistics relate to what you see.
task.answer: Group 1: \(\bar{x}=50\) and \(s=31.6\). Group 2: \(\bar{x}=50\) and \(s=15.8\). How statistics relate to what we see: Same central locations; greater spread is Group 1.

task.query: (b) Comparison B: Calculate the mean and standard deviation for Group 1 and Group 2 based on the stemplot. Discuss how these statistics relate to what you see.
task.answer: Group 1: \(\bar{x}=70\) and \(s=15.8\). Group 2: \(\bar{x}=50\) and \(s=15.8\). How statistics relate to what we see: Higher central location in Group 1; equal group spreads.

task.query: (c) Comparison C: Calculate the mean and standard deviation for Group 1 and Group 2 based on the stemplot. Discuss how these statistics relate to what you see.
task.answer: Group 1: \(\bar{x}=50\) and \(s=31.6\). Group 2: \(\bar{x}=70\) and \(s=15.8\). How statistics relate to what we see: Smaller central location and greater spread in Group 1.
